meta.notes: EXAMPLE only - hand-authored structure with INVENTED rates; NOT copied from Octopus. Economy 7 = ~7 night hours cheaper; the exact window depends on the meter/region and rates vary by region+date. Octopus's ToS forbids redistributing its content, so real Octopus rates must be imported ON-DEVICE via its public API by region code, never bulk-stored here. sourceUrl is an informational pointer only.
